CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. Counts won Opportunities closed two years ago where this Contact has the primary Opportunity Contact Role. Uses the Won Opportunities for Hard Credit filter group. Fiscal vs. calendar year is configured in Household Settings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The number of won Opportunities closed two years ago where this Contact is the primary donor.
CustomField.label: Number of Gifts Two Years Ago
